reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de un playero. Viernes a la mañana. Un hombre de 40/50 años. Me cobró de más y fue muy soberbio. Me devolvió la plata pero su trato fue pésimo.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from a beach attendant. Friday morning. A man in his 40s or 50s. He overcharged me and was very arrogant. He refunded my money, but his treatment was terrible.

reviews.comment:
Hace poco estuve por Paso de los Libres y cargue combustible en esta estación de servicio. Excelente la atención, muy predispuestos los playeros.
Paramos a cargar y aprovechamos para desayunar, el personal nos trató muy bien, con mucha amabilidad.
Super recomendable 🙂👌🏽

(Translated by Google)
I was recently in Paso de los Libres and filled up at this gas station. Excellent service, the attendants were very helpful.
We stopped to fill up and took the opportunity to have breakfast. The staff treated us very well and were very friendly. Highly recommended! 🙂👌🏽
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13560852497782036478/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNndWF2aU9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente
La atención del personal es impecable amables, atentos y con muy buena predisposición.
El lugar está muy limpio, los baños en perfectas condiciones y el servicio es rápido.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! The staff is impeccable—friendly, attentive, and very helpful.
The place is very clean, the restrooms are in perfect condition, and the service is fast.

reviews.comment:
Falta de limpieza del predio en general y de los baños en particular.
No recomiendo pasar pasen de
largo vayan a otra estación de servicio, un asco.
A 15 minutos del lado brasilero hay una estación de servicio que está impecable.

(Translated by Google)
The premises are generally unclean, especially the restrooms.
I don't recommend going there; just keep walking and go to another gas station. It's disgusting.
There's a gas station 15 minutes away on the Brazilian side that's spotless.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13560852497782036478/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnbWV2RVZBEAE

reviews.comment:
DECEPCION!!!!!!!!!! La verdad que no me podia imaginar que el AUTOMÓVIL CLUB ARGENTINO podia tener unas instalaciones DE TAL MAGNITUD DE IMPORTANCIA, porque está en el cruce con Brasil, podía llegar a estar TAN mal. Baños mugrientos, Mesas sucias, agua caliente todo mugriento, las baldosas. Lo unico bueno son los playeros, luego todo malo.

ACA ME ESPERABA MAS DE VOS EH🚨😡🤬😡🤬😡🤬🚨💔💔💔💔

(Translated by Google)
DISAPPOINTMENT!!!!!!!!!! I honestly couldn't imagine that the ARGENTINE AUTOMOBILE CLUB could have such important facilities, especially considering its location at the border with Brazil, and yet be in such bad shape. Filthy bathrooms, dirty tables, grimy hot water, even the tiles. The only good thing is the attendants; everything else is terrible.

I EXPECTED MORE FROM YOU, HUH? 🚨😡🤬😡🤬😡🤬🚨💔💔💔💔
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13560852497782036478/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnbWF5MGxBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuve el domingo 16/02 a las 14 hs por la cantidad de autos que había la atención fue rápida y correcta.
Hay varias personas para cambiar reales. El cambio era a $235. Y por 100 dolares te daban 500 reales.

(Translated by Google)
I was there on Sunday, February 16, at 2:00 PM. Due to the number of cars, the service was quick and efficient.
There were several people available to exchange reais. The exchange rate was $235. And for $100, they gave you 500 reais.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13560852497782036478/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnNGRTeFV3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es una mugre. Se podria entender que no esté impecable por el gran número de personas que recibe por día pero la mugre que tiene es acumulada por la falta de limpieza absoluta. Olor a orina en todos lados y el shop nada de variedad. Inexplicable que presten un servicio tan deficiente teniendo a la gallina de los huevos de oro.

(Translated by Google)
It's filthy. You could understand it not being spotless given the large number of people it receives daily, but the grime is clearly accumulated due to a complete lack of cleaning. There's a smell of urine everywhere, and the shop has absolutely no variety. It's inexplicable that they provide such poor service when they have such a lucrative business.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13560852497782036478/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBZ2ZMaXZ3RRAB
